summary: 7-phase plan to assemble 14-slide Slidev CONFERENCE talk under examples/epi-slides/ using academic-clean theme and task-28 enriched outputs.

artifacts.summary: Slidev-based implementation plan (framework: Slidev with academic-clean theme) in 7 phases scaffolding examples/epi-slides/, building theme + 6 components including new CodeDiff, importing task-28 assets, authoring 14 slides per report 02 slide map, and verifying build/export. All build artifacts live under examples/epi-slides/; specs/029 retains only plan and summary.
